reviews.comment:
Muy limpio los baños. Solo que es muy pero muy caluroso, 35 grados en la noche y de día mucho más.

(Translated by Google)
The bathrooms are very clean. It's just that it's very, very hot, 35 degrees at night and much hotter during the day.

(Translated by Google)
Very attentive employees

reviews.comment:
Es el único YPF que hay en muchos km. El bar tiene aire acondicionado, y bebidas frescas. Los precios son un poco caros.

(Translated by Google)
It's the only YPF station for miles around. The bar has air conditioning and cold drinks. The prices are a bit high.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/15838772092336886601/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNtMGRpV0xBEAE

reviews.comment:
Parada obligada cuando vas de viaje exelente atención y la limpieza muy buena

(Translated by Google)
A must-stop when you're traveling; excellent service and very clean.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/15838772092336886601/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNtbm9McUlBEAE

reviews.comment:
Los sanitarios están en perfecto estado muy limpios
La atención en el full es muy cordial

(Translated by Google)
The restrooms are in perfect condition and very clean.
The staff at the full-service restaurant are very friendly.

reviews.comment:
Siempre confiable...ese punto que lo ves y te alegra porque falta poco para llegar

(Translated by Google)
Always reliable...that point you see and you're happy because there's not much time left to get there.

reviews.comment:
Buena atención de los muchachos lastima que el dueño les cobra hasta el agua del dispenser.

(Translated by Google)
The guys are great, it's a shame the owner charges them for everything, even the water from the dispenser.

reviews.comment:
Muy buenas instalaciones de baño y camping con agua potable.
El shop mala atencion y es muy caro lo que se compra.

(Translated by Google)

The shop offers poor service and the items purchased are very expensive.

reviews.comment:
Casi a la entrada a la prov. de Catamarca , rumbo a Tinogasta. Excelente atencion.Baños bien limpios.

(Translated by Google)
Almost at the entrance to the province of Catamarca, on the way to Tinogasta. Excellent service. Very clean bathrooms.
